GetAttachmentExtension.Description: Check if the extension is not nil before using it.

GetVelocity.Description: Returns the current velocity vector in meters per second.

ModelInfo.Description: Check if 'object.ModelInfo' is not nil before using it.

isFixed.Description: gamestate flag indicating whether the object is using fixed physics

usesCollision.Description: gamestate flag indicating whether the object is using collision

GetGamerInfo.Description: Returns a structure 'GamerInfo' holding information about the player.

IsLocalPlayer.Description: Check whether its the local player or not.

IsReportBitSet.Description: Check if a report flag is set. Also called Rockstar Anti Cheat(RAC).

PlayerInfo.Description: Returns a class 'CPlayerInfo' holding information about the player.

GetEntity.Description: Check if 'object:GetEntity()' is not nil before using it. Invalid for NetObjDoor.

ObjectID.Description: Used to identify or to find a netobject.

PendingPlayerId.Description: The next physical player in the process of being given control.

PlayerId.Description: The physical player in control of this network object

GetAttachmentExtension.Description: Check if the extension is not nil before using it.

GetVelocity.Description: Returns the current velocity vector in meters per second.

ModelInfo.Description: Check if 'object.ModelInfo' is not nil before using it.

NetObject.Description: Check if 'object.NetObject' is not nil before using it.

GetAttachmentExtension.Description: Check if the extension is not nil before using it.

GetVelocity.Description: Returns the current velocity vector in meters per second.

ModelInfo.Description: Check if 'object.ModelInfo' is not nil before using it.

NetObject.Description: Check if 'object.NetObject' is not nil before using it.

GetAttachmentExtension.Description: Check if the extension is not nil before using it.

GetVelocity.Description: Returns the current velocity vector in meters per second.

ModelInfo.Description: Check if 'object.ModelInfo' is not nil before using it.

NetObject.Description: Check if 'object.NetObject' is not nil before using it.

ForceAirDragMult.Description: Affects the air drag of the player's current car/bike

HavocCaused.Description: A counter going up when the player does bad stuff.

LastTargetVehicle.Description: Last vehicle player tried to enter.

NetData.Description: structure to GamerInfo holding information about the player

NumEnemiesInCombat.Description: A count of the number of enemy peds in combat targetting this player.

NumEnemiesShootingInCombat.Description: A count of the number of enemy peds shooting at this player.

OnlyEnterThisVehicle.Description: Restrict the player to only being able to enter this vehicle (script-controlled)

PlayerPed.Description: Pointer to the player ped (should always be set)

PlayerState.Description: PLAYERSTATE_INVALID = -1, PLAYERSTATE_PLAYING, PLAYERSTATE_HASDIED, PLAYERSTATE_HASBEENARRESTED, PLAYERSTATE_FAILEDMISSION, PLAYERSTATE_LEFTGAME, PLAYERSTATE_RESPAWN, PLAYERSTATE_IN_MP_CUTSCENE

PreferFrontPassengerSeatVehicle.Description: Script can prefer the player to enter the front passenger seat for this vehicle

PreferRearSeatsVehicle.Description: Script can prefer the player to enter the rear seats for this vehicle

As.Description: Dynamically cast this node to any concrete sync data node by name.

dive.Description: the current value of the dive control.

pitch.Description: the current value of the pitch control.

yaw.Description: the current value of the yaw control.

GetAttachmentExtension.Description: Check if the extension is not nil before using it.

GetVelocity.Description: Returns the current velocity vector in meters per second.

ModelInfo.Description: Check if 'object.ModelInfo' is not nil before using it.

NetObject.Description: Check if 'object.NetObject' is not nil before using it.

AddPlayerTab.Description: Adds a lua tab to the player options.

AddTab.Description: Adds a lua tab to the main gui.

BeginCustomChildWindow.Description: Begin custom ImgGui Child window. The text alignment range is [0.0 - 1.0]. A value of -1.0 indicates the default value.
BeginCustomChildWindow.Example: bool ClickGUI.BeginCustomChildWindow(string label, int frames = -1, int textLines = -1, number textAlignX = -1.0, number textAlignY = -1.0)

GetActiveMenuTab.Description: Get the current open menu tab.

GetPos.Description: Get the current position in screen coordinates.

GetSize.Description: Get the current size in screen coordinates.

LoadTheme.Description: Loads a Theme by its name.

RemovePlayerTab.Description: Removes a lua tab from the player options.

RemoveTab.Description: Removes a lua tab from the main gui.

RenderFeature.Description: Render a feature for the given feature hash and index.
RenderFeature.Example:
bool ClickGUI.RenderFeature(int hash)
bool ClickGUI.RenderFeature(int hash, int index)

SetActiveMenuTab.Description: Set the current open menu tab.

Easy.Description: Create a new curl object. Never lose this object until you are completely done with it. Never do 'Curl.Easy():Setopt' because this will cause the object to be lost by lua gc.
Easy.Example:
LuaCurl Curl.Easy()
curlObject = Curl.Easy()
curlObject:Setopt(eCurlOption.CURLOPT_URL, "https://www.google.com/"):Perform()
--Peform is an async task so keep the curlObject somewhere where it does not get freed from lua gc.

GetFinished.Description: Get whether or not the Perform call has finished.

GetResponse.Description: Get the response. The response string is only valid when no custom Write Function was used.

Perform.Description: Perform the curl operation after set up. Perform is called asynchronously. Call GetFinished() to check the current state.

Setopt.Description: Set specific curl options during initialize.
Setopt.Example:
LuaCurl object:Setopt(eCurlOption option, string str)
LuaCurl object:Setopt(eCurlOption option, int value)
LuaCurl object:Setopt(eCurlOption.CURLOPT_URL, "https://www.google.com/")

GetFrame.Description: The index starts at 0. The max index is (GetFrameCount - 1).

GetFrameCount.Description: Returns the number of frames in this texture.

ReadBool.Description: Reads a bool from the buffer. Format: [value, success]

ReadInt.Description: Reads a signed integer from the buffer. Format: [value, success]

ReadString.Description: Reads a zero-terminated string from the buffer. Format: [value, success]

ReadUns.Description: Reads an unsigned integer from the buffer. Format: [value, success]

Seek.Description: Sets the bit position of the cursor. This is the location of the next read/write.

RegisterHandler.Description: Register a handler that will be called for a specific event.
RegisterHandler.Example: int EventMgr.RegisterHandler(eLuaEvent event, function func() end)

RemoveHandler.Description: Remove a previously registered handler by id.

AddHotKey.Description: Adds a hotkey for the feature and returns itself.

AddInfoContentFeature.Description: Add an feature as info content for eFeatureType ListWithInfo.

AddRenderAfter.Description: Adds a feature to a list that will be rendered after this feature.

AddRenderBefore.Description: Adds a feature to a list that will be rendered before this feature.

ClearHotkeys.Description: Removes all hotkeys for this feature.

GetArrayIndex.Description: If this feature is part of an feature array, this is the index.

GetColor.Description: Gets the current color in rgba.
GetColor.Example: int r, g, b, a object:GetColor()

GetColorFloats.Description: Gets the current color in rgba as floats from 0.0 to 1.0 .
GetColorFloats.Example: number r, g, b, a object:GetColorFloats()

GetColorU32.Description: Gets the current color in packed rgba.

GetDesc.Description: Get the description of the feature.

GetFastStepSizeFloat.Description: Gets the feature fast step size used in a slider.

GetFastStepSizeInt.Description: Gets the feature fast step size used in a slider.

GetFloatLimitValues.Description: Returns the minimum and maximum floating value.

GetFormat.Description: Returns the format used for slider and input values.

GetHotkeys.Description: Get all hotkeys for this feature.

GetId.Description: Returns the feature id in creation order.

GetIntLimitValues.Description: Returns the minimum and maximum integer value.

GetList.Description: Gets the list for feature types like combo.

GetListIndex.Description: Gets the current list index of the feature.

GetName.Description: Get the name of the feature.

GetPlayerIndex.Description: Same as GetArrayIndex but you might prefer this if you are using a player feature.

GetRenderAfter.Description: Returns a list of features that will be rendered after this feature.

GetRenderBefore.Description: Returns a list of features that will be rendered before this feature.

GetStepSizeFloat.Description: Gets the feature step size used in a slider.

GetStepSizeInt.Description: Gets the feature step size used in a slider.

GetType.Description: Gets the feature type. E.g eFeatureType.Button

IsListIndexToggled.Description: Returns whether the list index has been toggled for types like ComboToggles.

IsPlayerFeature.Description: Returns whether the feature is a player feature or not.

IsSaveable.Description: Returns whether the feature should be safed in settings or not..

IsSearchable.Description: Gets whether a feature can be found by search or not.

IsToggleFeature.Description: Returns whether the feature can be toggled or not.

IsToggled.Description: Returns whether the feature is currently toggled or not.

IsVisible.Description: Returns whether the feature should be shown in the GUI or not.

LoadSettings.Description: Load the specific settings for this feature from a file.

OnClick.Description: Triggers the callback as if it would be called from the GUI.

OnSettingsLoad.Description: Triggers the callback as if it would be called from the settings loader.

RegisterCallbackTrigger.Description: Registers Callback Trigger for the feature and returns itself.

RemoveHotkey.Description: Remove specific hotkeys for this feature.

RemoveRenderAfter.Description: Returns true when at least one feature was removed

RemoveRenderBefore.Description: Returns true when at least one feature was removed

Render.Description: Renders the feature in the current context. Return true if rendered.

Reset.Description: Restore the current values with the default values.

SetColor.Example: Feature object:SetColor(int r, int g, int b, int a)

SetColorFloats.Example: Feature object:SetColorFloats(number r, number g, number b, number a)

SetColorU32.Description: Sets the current color in packed rgba.

SetDefaultValue.Description: Sets the default feature value and returns itself.

SetDesc.Description: Set the description of the feature.

SetFastStepSize.Description: Sets the feature fast step size used in a slider.

SetFormat.Description: Sets the format used for slider and input values.

SetLimitValues.Description: Sets the feature minimum and maximum values and returns itself.

SetList.Description: Sets the list for feature types like combo.

SetListIndex.Description: Sets the current list index of the feature.

SetMaxValue.Description: Sets the feature maximum value and returns itself.

SetMinValue.Description: Sets the feature minimum value and returns itself.

SetName.Description: Set the name of the feature.

SetNoCallbackOnPress.Description: This disables the callback for OnClick.

SetNoCallbackOnSettingsLoad.Description: This disables the callback for OnSettingsLoad.

SetSaveable.Description: Sets whether the feature should be safed in settings or not.

SetSearchable.Description: Sets whether a feature can be found by search or not.

SetStepSize.Description: Sets the feature step size used in a slider.

SetValue.Description: Sets the current feature value and returns itself.

SetVisible.Description: Sets whether the feature should be shown in the GUI or not.

Toggle.Description: Flips the current boolean value of this feature.

ToggleListIndex.Description: Toggles the list index for types like ComboToggles.

AddFeature.Description: Create and add a new feature to the list.
AddFeature.Example: Feature FeatureMgr.AddFeature(int hash, string name, eFeatureType type, string desc = , function(Feature) callback = 0, bool nativeThreadExecution = true, bool forceQueue = false)

AddFeatureArray.Description: Create and add a new features. Returns list of the created feature hashes.
AddFeatureArray.Example: table<int, int> FeatureMgr.AddFeatureArray(int size, int hash, string name, eFeatureType type, string desc = ,function(Feature) callback = 0, bool nativeThreadExecution = true, bool forceQueue = false)

AddPlayerFeature.Description: Creates an array of 32 features which will automatically reset when the player leaves.
AddPlayerFeature.Example: table<int, int> FeatureMgr.AddPlayerFeature(int hash, string name, eFeatureType type, string desc = , function(Feature) callback = 0, bool nativeThreadExecution = true, bool forceQueue = false)

GetAllPlayerFeatureHashes.Example:
table<int, int> FeatureMgr.GetAllPlayerFeatureHashes()
table<int, int> FeatureMgr.GetAllPlayerFeatureHashes(int playerId)

GetCurrentFeatureListString.Description: Returns the string value of the current feature list index.
GetCurrentFeatureListString.Example:
string FeatureMgr.GetCurrentFeatureListString(int hash)
string FeatureMgr.GetCurrentFeatureListString(int hash, int index)

GetFeature.Example:
Feature FeatureMgr.GetFeature(int hash)
Feature FeatureMgr.GetFeature(int hash, int index)

GetFeatureByName.Example:
Feature FeatureMgr.GetFeatureByName(string name)
Feature FeatureMgr.GetFeatureByName(string name, int index)

GetFeatureColor.Description: Returns the color value of the feature.
GetFeatureColor.Example:
int r, g, b, a FeatureMgr.GetFeatureColor(int hash)
int r, g, b, a FeatureMgr.GetFeatureColor(int hash, int index)

GetFeatureFloat.Description: Returns the float value of the feature.
GetFeatureFloat.Example:
number FeatureMgr.GetFeatureFloat(int hash)
number FeatureMgr.GetFeatureFloat(int hash, int index)

GetFeatureInt.Description: Returns the int value of the feature.
GetFeatureInt.Example:
int FeatureMgr.GetFeatureInt(int hash)
int FeatureMgr.GetFeatureInt(int hash, int index)

GetFeatureList.Description: Returns all string items of the feature list.
GetFeatureList.Example:
table<int, string> FeatureMgr.GetFeatureList(int hash)
table<int, string> FeatureMgr.GetFeatureList(int hash, int index)

GetFeatureListIndex.Description: Returns the current index of the feature list.
GetFeatureListIndex.Example:
int FeatureMgr.GetFeatureListIndex(int hash)
int FeatureMgr.GetFeatureListIndex(int hash, int index)

GetFeatureString.Description: Returns the string value of the feature.
GetFeatureString.Example:
string FeatureMgr.GetFeatureString(int hash)
string FeatureMgr.GetFeatureString(int hash, int index)

GetFocusedFeature.Description: Returns the current focused(ClickGui) / selected(ListGui) feature.

GetHoveredFeature.Description: Returns the current hovered(ClickGui) / selected(ListGui) feature.

IsFeatureEnabled.Description: Returns the boolean value of the feature.
IsFeatureEnabled.Example:
bool FeatureMgr.IsFeatureEnabled(int hash)
bool FeatureMgr.IsFeatureEnabled(int hash, int index)

IsFeatureToggled.Description: Returns if the feature is toggled.
IsFeatureToggled.Example:
bool FeatureMgr.IsFeatureToggled(int hash)
bool FeatureMgr.IsFeatureToggled(int hash, int index)

LoadSettings.Description: Loads the given settings. File can be relative or absolute.

RemoveFeature.Description: Removes the feature for the given hash.

RemoveFeatureArray.Description: Removes the feature array for the given hash and size.

RemovePlayerFeature.Description: Removes the player feature for the given hash.

ResetAllPlayerFeatures.Description: Resets all player features for every player.

ResetFeature.Description: Restore the current values with the default values of the feature.
ResetFeature.Example:
void FeatureMgr.ResetFeature(int hash)
void FeatureMgr.ResetFeature(int hash, int index)

ResetPlayerFeatures.Description: Resets all player features for given player id.

SearchFeature.Description: Searches the best matching features for a given result. Uses translations for results. You should cache results whenever input changes. Expensive execution time.
SearchFeature.Example: table<int, int> FeatureMgr.SearchFeature(string input, int maxResults, number cutoffPercent)

SetFeatureColor.Description: Sets the color value of the feature.
SetFeatureColor.Example:
void FeatureMgr.SetFeatureColor(int hash, int r, int g, int b, int a)
void FeatureMgr.SetFeatureColor(int hash, int index, int r, int g, int b, int a)

SetFeatureFloat.Description: Sets the float value of the feature.
SetFeatureFloat.Example:
void FeatureMgr.SetFeatureFloat(int hash, number value)
void FeatureMgr.SetFeatureFloat(int hash, int index, number value)

SetFeatureInt.Description: Sets the int value of the feature.
SetFeatureInt.Example:
void FeatureMgr.SetFeatureInt(int hash, int value)
void FeatureMgr.SetFeatureInt(int hash, int index, int value)

SetFeatureListIndex.Description: Sets the current index of the feature list.
SetFeatureListIndex.Example:
void FeatureMgr.SetFeatureListIndex(int hash, int listIndex)
void FeatureMgr.SetFeatureListIndex(int hash, int index, int listIndex)

SetFeatureString.Description: Sets the string value of the feature.
SetFeatureString.Example:
void FeatureMgr.SetFeatureString(int hash, string value)
void FeatureMgr.SetFeatureString(int hash, int index, string value)

ToggleFeature.Description: Flips the current boolean value of the feature.
ToggleFeature.Example:
void FeatureMgr.ToggleFeature(int hash)
void FeatureMgr.ToggleFeature(int hash, int index)

TriggerFeatureCallback.Example:
void FeatureMgr.TriggerFeatureCallback(int hash)
void FeatureMgr.TriggerFeatureCallback(int hash, int index)

CreateDir.Description: Ensures that the given path is a directory.

DeleteFile.Description: Deletes the given file using an absolute path.

DoesFileExist.Description: Check whether the file exist using an absolute path.

FindFiles.Description: Returns a list of all found files.
FindFiles.Example: table<int,string> FileMgr.FindFiles(string path, string extension, bool recursive)

GetMenuRootPath.Description: Returns the root directory of the menu.

ReadFileContent.Description: Reads the file content using an absolute path.

Unzip.Description: Extract a .zip file to a given directory.

WriteFileContent.Description: Writes the given content to a file using an absolute path.
WriteFileContent.Example: bool FileMgr.WriteFileContent(string path, string content, bool append = false)

AddChatMessageToPool.Description: Adds a chat message locally on your pc only. You can specify the sender of the message. The message has a max length of 255 characters.
AddChatMessageToPool.Example: void GTA.AddChatMessageToPool(int playerId, string message, bool team)

AddExplosion.Description: Add an explosion without any restrictions.

BasketAddItem.Description: Adds an item to the Basket Transaction.

BasketStart.Example: bool valid, int transactionId GTA.BasketStart(int category, int action, int flags)

BeginService.Example: bool valid, int transactionId GTA.BeginService(int type, int category, int service, int action, int price, int flags)

CheckoutStart.Description: Starts the checkout of a transaction. Should be used for services and baskets.

ConvertSectorToWorldPosition.Description: Converts the sector pos to world cords.

ConvertWorldToSectorPosition.Description: Converts the world pos to sector and relative position. This is being used in sync data nodes to sync the actual position of entities.

CreateObject.Description: Spawns an object. Should only be executed in a native thread.
CreateObject.Example:
int GTA.CreateObject(int hash, float x, float y, float z, bool dynamic, bool isNetworked = true)
int GTA.CreateObject(string model, float x, float y, float z, bool dynamic, bool isNetworked = true)

CreatePed.Description: Spawns a ped. Should only be executed in a native thread.
CreatePed.Example:
int GTA.CreatePed(int hash, int pedType, float x, float y, float z, number heading, bool isNetworked = true, bool autoCleanup = true)
int GTA.CreatePed(string model, int pedType, float x, float y, float z, number heading, bool isNetworked = true, bool autoCleanup = true)

CreateRandomPed.Description: Creates a random ped. Should only be executed in a native thread.
CreateRandomPed.Example: int GTA.CreateRandomPed(float x, float y, float z)

CreateWorldObject.Description: Spawns an world object using a bypass. Should only be executed in a native thread.
CreateWorldObject.Example:
int GTA.CreateWorldObject(int hash, float x, float y, float z, bool dynamic, bool isNetworked = true)
int GTA.CreateWorldObject(string model, float x, float y, float z, bool dynamic, bool isNetworked = true)

DrawPedPreview.Description: Renders a given CPed on the frontend.
DrawPedPreview.Example:
void GTA.DrawPedPreview(CPed ped, v2 relativeScreen, v2 size, float distance, float pitch, float yaw, float lightning)
GTA.DrawPedPreview(pPed, v2.new(0.5, 0.5), v2.new(0.1, 0.2), -4.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0)

ForceScriptHost.Description: Forces yourself to script host of the given script.

GetBonePos2D.Description: Does the same as GetBonePos3D and then converts them to normalized screen coordinates.

GetBonePos3D.Description: Gets the bone world position based on the specified ped and mask.

GetDisplayNameFromHash.Description: Returns the display name of a specific hash.

GetGroundZ.Description: Returns whether the ground was found and the Z coordinate it was found at.
GetGroundZ.Example: bool, number GTA.GetGroundZ(number x, number y)

GetLabelText.Description: Returns a specific label for a given text entry.
GetLabelText.Example:
string GTA.GetLabelText(string str)
string GTA.GetLabelText(int hashCode)

GetLocalPed.Description: Returns the local player CPed. Might be nil.

GetLocalVehicle.Description: Returns the local player's current CVehicle. Might be nil.

GetModelInfoFromHash.Description: Returns Model Info by hash. Returns nil if no CBaseModelInfo found.

GetModelInfoIndexFromHash.Description: Returns Model Info Index by hash. Returns -1 if invalid.

GetModelNameFromHash.Description: Returns the model name of the model hash.

GiveControl.Description: Force another player take control of the given entity.

GiveScriptHost.Description: Give a sepcific player script host of the given script.

HandleToPointer.Description: Converts an entity handle into a CPhysical pointer.

PointerToHandle.Description: Converts a CPhysical pointer into an entity handle.

RegisterFile.Description: Registers the given file for the game so it can be used by natives.

SendChatMessageToEveryone.Description: Sends a chat message to every player in the session. Note: You won't see that message yourself unless you manually add it to the chat pool. The message has a max length of 255 characters.

SendChatMessageToPlayer.Description: Sends a chat message to a given player in the session. Note: You won't see that message yourself unless you manually add it to the chat pool. The message has a max length of 255 characters.
SendChatMessageToPlayer.Example: void GTA.SendChatMessageToPlayer(int playerId, string message, bool team)

SetLabelText.Description: Overwrites the text for a specifc label which is being used by the game.
SetLabelText.Example:
void GTA.SetLabelText(string label, string text)
GTA.SetLabelText("LOADING_MPLAYER_L", "Loading GTA Online with Cherax")

SpawnVehicle.Description: Should only be executed in a native thread.
SpawnVehicle.Example:
int GTA.SpawnVehicle(int hash, float x, float y, float z, number heading, bool isNetworked = true, bool autoCleanup = true)
int GTA.SpawnVehicle(string model, float x, float y, float z, number heading, bool isNetworked = true, bool autoCleanup = true)

SpawnVehicleForPlayer.Description: Spawns a vehicle in front of the given player. Should only be executed in a native thread.
SpawnVehicleForPlayer.Example:
int GTA.SpawnVehicleForPlayer(int hash, int player, number forward = 5.0)
int GTA.SpawnVehicleForPlayer(string model, int player, number forward = 5.0)

TriggerScriptEvent.Description: Triggers a script event for given player(s).
TriggerScriptEvent.Example:
int GTA.TriggerScriptEvent(int bitflags, table<int, int> arguments)
int GTA.TriggerScriptEvent(int bitflags, variadic_args arguments)

WorldToScreen.Description: Converts a 3D world position to a 2D normalized screen position. To get the actual screen coordinates multiply them with the screen size.
WorldToScreen.Example: float, float GTA.WorldToScreen(float x, y, z)

AddToast.Example: bool GUI.AddToast(string title, string text, int duration, eToastPos pos)

GetCurrentRenderMode.Description: Returns which GUI Mode is currently rendering. Usefull when Both GUIs are rendering in the same frame.

IsOpen.Description: Returns whether the GUI is open or not.

IsValid.Description: Returns true if the GamerHandle is valid.

ToBuffer.Description: Converts the GamerHandle into a GamerHandleBuffer used by most natives.

GetSize.Description: Returns the size of the GamerHandleBuffer.

ToHandle.Description: Converts the GamerHandleBuffer into a GamerHandle.

AddHotkey.Description: Adds a new hotkey for a feature.

GetAllHotkeys.Description: Returns all hotkeys and their associated feature hash.

GetHotKeys.Description: Returns all hotkeys for a specific feature hash.

RemoveHotkey.Description: Removes specific hotkey from an feature.

AddCircleFilled.Example: void ImGui.AddCircleFilled(number x, number y, number radius, int r, int g, int b, int a, int numSegments = 0)

AddImage.Description:
min and max represent the upper-left and lower-right corners of the rectangle.
uv_min and uv_max represent the normalized texture coordinates to use for those corners. Using (0,0)->(1,1) texture coordinates will generally display the entire texture.
AddImage.Example: void ImGui.AddImage(ImTextureID texture, number min_x, number min_y, number max_x, number max_y, number uv_min_x = 0.0, number uv_min_y = 0.0, number uv_max_x = 1.0, number uv_max_y = 1.0, int color = 255 << 24 | 255 << 16 | 255 << 8 | 255)

AddImageQuad.Example: void ImGui.AddImageQuad(ImTextureID texture, V2 p1, V2 p2, V2 p3, V2 p4, V2 uv1 = Vector2.New(0.0, 0.0), V2 uv2 = Vector2.New(1.0, 0.0), V2 uv3 = Vector2.New(1.0, 1.0), V2 uv4 = Vector2.New(0.0, 1.0), int alpha = 255)

AddImageRotated.Example: void ImGui.AddImageRotated(ImTextureID texture, number center_x, number center_y, number width, number height, number angle, int alpha = 255)

AddImageRounded.Example: void ImGui.AddImageRounded(ImTextureID texture, number min_x, number min_y, number max_x, number max_y, number uv_min_x = 0.0, number uv_min_y = 0.0, number uv_max_x = 1.0, number uv_max_y = 1.0, int color = 255 << 24 | 255 << 16 | 255 << 8 | 255, number rounding = 16.0)

AddRect.Example: void ImGui.AddRect(number x1, number y1, number x2, number y2, int r, int g, int b, int a, number rounding = 1.0, int drawFlags = 0, number thickness = 1.0)

AddRectFilled.Example: void ImGui.AddRectFilled(number x1, number y1, number x2, number y2, int r, int g, int b, int a, number rounding = 1.0, int drawFlags = 0)

void ImGui.AddRectFilledMultiColor(number x1, number y1, number x2, number y2, int col_upr_left, int col_upr_right, int col_bot_right, int col_bot_left)
ImGui.AddRectFilledMultiColor(0, 0, 100, 100, ColorConvertRGBAToU32({255, 255, 255, 255}), ColorConvertRGBAToU32({255, 255, 255, 255}), ColorConvertRGBAToU32({0, 0, 0, 255}), ColorConvertRGBAToU32({0, 0, 0, 255}))

AddText.Example: void ImGui.AddText(number x, number y, strig text, int r, int g, int b, int a)

AddTriangle.Example: void ImGui.AddTriangle(number x1, number y1, number x2, number y2, number x3, number y3, int r, int g, int b, int a, number thickness = 1.0)

AddTriangleFilled.Example: void ImGui.AddTriangleFilled(number x1, number y1, number x2, number y2, number x3, number y3, int r, int g, int b, int a)

BeginTable.Example: bool ImGui.BeginTable(string strId, int columns, ImGuiTableFlags flags)

BgAddCircle.Example: void ImGui.BgAddCircle(number x, number y, number radius, int r, int g, int b, int a, int numSegments = 0, number thickness = 1.0)

BgAddCircleFilled.Example: void ImGui.BgAddCircleFilled(number x, number y, number radius, int r, int g, int b, int a, int numSegments = 0)

BgAddImage.Description:
min and max represent the upper-left and lower-right corners of the rectangle.
uv_min and uv_max represent the normalized texture coordinates to use for those corners. Using (0,0)->(1,1) texture coordinates will generally display the entire texture.
BgAddImage.Example: void ImGui.BgAddImage(ImTextureID texture, number min_x, number min_y, number max_x, number max_y, number uv_min_x = 0.0, number uv_min_y = 0.0, number uv_max_x = 1.0, number uv_max_y = 1.0, int color = 255 << 24 | 255 << 16 | 255 << 8 | 255)

BgAddImageRotated.Example: void ImGui.BgAddImageRotated(ImTextureID texture, number center_x, number center_y, number width, number height, number angle, int alpha = 255)

BgAddImageRounded.Example: void ImGui.BgAddImageRounded(ImTextureID texture, number min_x, number min_y, number max_x, number max_y, number uv_min_x = 0.0, number uv_min_y = 0.0, number uv_max_x = 1.0, number uv_max_y = 1.0, int color = 255 << 24 | 255 << 16 | 255 << 8 | 255, number rounding = 16.0)

ImGui.BgAddRectFilledMultiColor(0, 0, 100, 100, ColorConvertRGBAToU32({255, 255, 255, 255}), ColorConvertRGBAToU32({255, 255, 255, 255}), ColorConvertRGBAToU32({0, 0, 0, 255}), ColorConvertRGBAToU32({0, 0, 0, 255}))

ColorConvertFloat4ToU32.Description: Converts a float 4 into a packed color.

ColorConvertRGBAToU32.Description: Converts an rgba table to a packed color.

ColorConvertU32ToFloat4.Description: Converts a packed color into a float 4.

GetPlayerTab.Description: Returns a specific player tab. (ranges from 0-31).

GetPos.Description: Get the current position in screen coordinates.

GetSize.Description: Get the current size in screen coordinates.

LoadTheme.Description: Loads a Theme by its name.

RemoveTabFromStack.Description: Remoces the tab from the stack and jump back to the tab before.

SetCurrentTab.Description: Adds the tab to the tab stack or jumps back if it is already in the tab stack.

SetPos.Description: Set the current position in screen coordinates.

SetSize.Description: Set the current size in screen coordinates.

Log.Example: void Logger.Log(eLogColor color, string prefix, string str)

Alloc.Description: Allocates a block of size bytes of memory, returning a pointer to the beginning of the block. The content of the newly allocated block of memory is not initialized, remaining with indeterminate values. Consider using Memory.MemSet

AllocInt.Description: Allocates a 4 byte buffer where an integer can be stored.

Free.Description: Deallocates a block of memory, making it available again for further allocations

GetBaseAddress.Description: Returns the base address of the given module.

LuaCallCFunction.Description: Calls a function with user-defined arguments.

LuaCallCFunctionWithReturnValue.Description: Calls a function with user-defined arguments and returns a pointer to the return value. You must free the return value yourself using Memory.Free.

MemSet.Description: Sets the first num bytes of the block of memory pointed by ptr to the specified value (interpreted as an unsigned char).
MemSet.Example: int Memory.MemSet(int ptr, int val, int num)

ReadByte.Description: Reads an 8-bit integer at the given address.

ReadFloat.Description: Reads a float at the given address.

ReadInt.Description: Reads a 32-bit integer at the given address.

ReadLong.Description: Reads a 64-bit integer at the given address.

ReadShort.Description: Reads an 16-bit integer at the given address.

ReadString.Description: Reads a string at the given address.

ReadUByte.Description: Reads an unsigned 8-bit integer at the given address.

ReadUInt.Description: Reads a unsigned 32-bit integer at the given address.

ReadUShort.Description: Reads an unsigned 16-bit integer at the given address.

ReadV3.Description: Reads a Vector3 at the given address.

Rip.Description: Rips the given address and returns the ripped address.

Scan.Description: Scans for a given pattern in a specific module and returns the address if found.

ScanScript.Description: Scans for a given pattern in a specific script and returns the address if found.

WriteByte.Description: Writes an 8-bit integer to the given address.

WriteFloat.Description: Writes a float to the given address.

WriteInt.Description: Writes a 32-bit integer to the given address.

WriteLong.Description: Writes a 64-bit integer to the given address.

WriteShort.Description: Writes an 16-bit integer to the given address.

WriteString.Description: Writes a string to the given address.

WriteUByte.Description: Writes an unsigned 8-bit integer to the given address.

WriteUInt.Description: Writes a unsigned 32-bit integer to the given address.

WriteUShort.Description: Writes an unsigned 16-bit integer to the given address.

WriteV3.Description: Writes a Vector3 to the given address.

InvokeBool.Description: Call a native that returns a boolean.

InvokeFloat.Description: Call a native that returns a float.

InvokeInt.Description: Call a native that returns an integer.

InvokePointer.Description: Call a native that returns a pointer.

InvokeString.Description: Call a native that returns a string.

InvokeV3.Description: Call a native that returns three floats representing a V3.

InvokeVoid.Description: Call a native that does not return a value.

ChangeOwner.Description: Changes the ownership of a network object.
ChangeOwner.Example: void NetworkObjectMgr.ChangeOwner(CNetObject object, CNetGamePlayer player, int migrationType)

GetNetworkObject.Description: includeAll - If this flag is set the function will also return unregistering objects and those being reassigned
GetNetworkObject.Example: CNetObject NetworkObjectMgr.GetNetworkObject(int netId, bool includeAll = false)

UnregisterNetworkObject.Description: Unregisters a network object with the manager and removes clones on remote machines if necessary.
UnregisterNetworkObject.Example: void NetworkObjectMgr.UnregisterNetworkObject(CNetObject object, int reason, bool bForce, bool bDestroyObject)

Get.Description: Returns the players for a given filter.
Get.Example: table<int, int> Players.Get(ePlayerListSort filter, string search)

GetByConId.Description: Returns the NetGamePlayer for a given connection id.

GetByEndpointId.Description: Returns the NetGamePlayer for a given endpoint id.

GetByGamerId.Description: Returns the NetGamePlayer for a given gamer id.

GetByIP.Description: Returns the NetGamePlayer for a given ip.
GetByIP.Example:
CNetGamePlayer Players.GetByIP(netSocketAddress addr)
CNetGamePlayer Players.GetByIP(int ip)

GetById.Description: Returns the NetGamePlayer for a given playerId.

GetByPeerId.Description: Returns the NetGamePlayer for a given peer id.

GetByRockstarId.Description: Returns the NetGamePlayer for a given rockstar id.

GetCamRot.Description: Gets the player's cam rotation in eulers.

GetIPString.Description: Returns a readable player ip string including the type of the connection.

GetTags.Description: Returns the player tags as string.

GetWaypoint.Description: Gets if the player has a waypoint, the position of the waypoint, and the owner of the waypoint.

GetCCamera.Description: Return the camera class object. Can have a performance impact if called to frequently.

GetCObject.Description: Return the object class object. Can have a performance impact if called to frequently.

GetCPed.Description: Return the ped class object. Can have a performance impact if called to frequently.

GetCPickup.Description: Return the pickup class object. Can have a performance impact if called to frequently.

GetCVehicle.Description: Return the vehicle class object. Can have a performance impact if called to frequently.

GetCamera.Description: Return the camera handle for a specific index. Can have a performance impact if called to frequently.

GetCurrentCameraCount.Description: Return the current amount of cameras.

GetCurrentObjectCount.Description: Return the current amount of objects.

GetCurrentPedCount.Description: Return the current amount of peds.

GetCurrentPickupCount.Description: Return the current amount of pickups.

GetCurrentVehicleCount.Description: Return the current amount of vehicles.

GetMaxCameraCount.Description: Return the maximum amount of cameras.

GetMaxObjectCount.Description: Return the maximum amount of objects.

GetMaxPedCount.Description: Return the maximum amount of peds.

GetMaxPickupCount.Description: Return the maximum amount of pickups.

GetMaxVehicleCount.Description: Return the maximum amount of vehicles.

GetObject.Description: Return the object handle for a specific index. Can have a performance impact if called to frequently.

GetPed.Description: Return the ped handle for a specific index. Can have a performance impact if called to frequently.

GetPickup.Description: Return the pickup handle for a specific index. Can have a performance impact if called to frequently.

GetRenderedObjects.Description: Return all currrently rendered CObject pointers

GetRenderedPeds.Description: Return all currrently rendered CPed pointers

GetRenderedVehicles.Description: Return all currrently rendered CVehicle pointers

GetVehicle.Description: Return the vehicle handle for a specific index. Can have a performance impact if called to frequently.

ExecuteAsScript.Description: Changes the current script context to your desired script, calls your function and then restores the orignal script context.
ExecuteAsScript.Example:
void Script.ExecuteAsScript(string scriptName, function fn)
void Script.ExecuteAsScript(int scriptHash, function fn)

QueueJob.Description: Queues a function that will be exeucted in a native thread.
QueueJob.Example: int Script.QueueJob(function(script, variadic_args) func, variadic_args va)

RegisterLooped.Description: Register a script that will be called in a loop.

Yield.Description: Sleeps for the given time in milliseconds. Should only be executed in a native thread.

GetTunableByHash.Description: Returns a pointer to the tunable. Returns 0 if not found.

SetBool.Example: void ScriptLocal.SetBool(int scriptHash, int local, bool value)

SetFloat.Example: void ScriptLocal.SetFloat(int scriptHash, int local, number value)

SetInt.Example: void ScriptLocal.SetInt(int scriptHash, int local, int value)

SetString.Example: void ScriptLocal.SetString(int scriptHash, int local, string text)

SetShouldUnload.Description: Mark the script as done. It will automatically be unloaded by the menu.

ShouldUnload.Description: Check if the script should unload. Use this to exit all your loops etc.

IPv4.Description: This value is a raw 4 byte integer.

ToString.Example:
string object:ToString(bool port)
string SocketAddress.ToString(SocketAddress address, bool port)

AddFeature.Description: Adds a feature to the tab.
AddFeature.Example:
void object:AddFeature(int hash)
void object:AddFeature(int hash, int index)

AddSubTab.Description: Adds Tab Button and returns the created tab.

GetContentSize.Description: Returns the number of widgets in this tab.

GetSubTab.Description: Returns a sub tab by name.

RemoveSubTab.Description: Removes a sub tab and returns the amount of removed tab buttons.

LoadTexture.Description: Creates a new texture that can load files such as gif,jpg,png etc.

LoadTextureAsync.Description: Creates a new texture that can load files such as gif,jpg,png etc.

Get.Description: Retrieves the current system time in seconds.

GetEpoche.Description: Retrieves the time since Epoche in seconds.

GetEpocheMs.Description: Retrieves the time since Epoche in milliseconds.

GetEpocheNs.Description: Retrieves the time since Epoche in nanoseconds, might not equal system time.

ExecuteScript.Description: Executes the given script. File can be relative or absolute.

GetLastJoinedPlayer.Description: Returns the last joined player id.

GetLastLeftPlayer.Description: Returns the last joined player id.

GetSelectedPlayer.Description: Returns the current selected player id.

IsKeyDown.Description: Check if a key is down. Use the Microsoft Virtual Key Codes.

IsKeyPressed.Description: Check if a key has been pressed or is hold down for longer time. Use the Microsoft Virtual Key Codes.

Joaat.Description: Hashes a string using joaat. Returns the hash as unsigned int.

MciSendString.Description: The mciSendString function sends a command string to an MCI device. The device that the command is sent to is specified in the command string. For more information browse it on the internet.

PlaySound.Description: Can be used to play mp3 or wav files.

SetClipBoardText.Description: For no extra notification leave whatNotify empty.

SetSelectedPlayer.Description: Sets the current selected Player Id. Returns the previous selected player id.

sJoaat.Description: Hashes a string using joaat. Returns the hash as signed int.
